description: MCP server for persistent memory and deterministic adapter execution for AI agents.
rules: Follow `next_action` exactly when `must_obey` is `true`. Finish the run with `reward` when directed before treating the task as complete.
Echo server-generated `nonce` and `proof_hash` verbatim in solutions. Never compute hashes yourself.
Protocol order is fixed: activate → forward (loop per layer) → reward. Never skip or reorder steps.
Echo `challenge.proof_hash` and subsequent top-level `proof_hash` values exactly as each tool description requires.
Errors include a fresh challenge. Retry using the data in the error response — do not restart from activate unless the tool text says so.
Space names are used at the tool interface; never pass raw space IDs as tool arguments.
When `must_obey` is `false`, use judgment; prefer `tune` / `train` to repair adapter markdown before aborting.
